ListEipGroup.id: The ID of the shared bandwidth to query
ListEipGroup.name: The name of the shared bandwidth to query
ListEipGroup.status: The status of the shared bandwidth to query
ListEipGroup.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
ListEipGroup.maxKeys: The maximum number of items per page, not exceeding 1000. Default value is 1000
